Rythmos® AI Camera-Based Sensor

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Presence detection
Bed exit
Movement analysis

Overview

Rythmos® AI Camera-Based Sensor is an intelligent visual monitoring device designed to enhance resident safety through real-time detection and verification. It combines AI-based analysis with visual context.

FUNCTIONS

Supports presence detection and bed exit monitoring
Tracks movement and activity patterns
Enables visual event verification

Key Capabilities

AI-Powered
Detection

Identifies
people, movement, and key events

Low-Light
Performance

Accurate
detection even in dark environments

Visual
Event Verification

Confirms
falls or incidents when needed

Privacy
Controls

ML-based
monitoring and alerts

360°
Coverage

Full
room visibility with pan-tilt functionality

Audio
Interaction

Two-way
communication capability

Hardware Specifications

Resolution: 1920 × 1080 (Full HD)
Lens: ~110° wide-angle
Pan / Tilt: 360° horizontal · 90° vertical
Night Vision: IR LEDs (up to ~9 m)
Audio: Built-in mic & speaker (2-way audio)
Connectivity: Wi-Fi 2.4 / 5 GHz
Storage: Cloud + optional MicroSD
Power: 5V / 1A (USB)
Mounting: Table or ceiling mount

System & Safety Features

Real-time monitoring & alerts: Immediate detection and response to events

Centralized visibility: Managed via Rythmos® platform

False alarm reduction: AI + sensor fusion improves detection accuracy

Context-aware insights: Adds visual confirmation to sensor data

Care workflow integration: Supports fall detection and monitoring systems

Scalable deployment: Supports multiple rooms and environments

System Topology — AI Camera-Based Sensor Deployment

Ideal for tracking and monitoring critical assets or individuals throughout the facility. Deploy in accordance with the community's layout to ensure full coverage and reliable alert delivery via the Rythmos® mesh infrastructure.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Position for full room visibility
- Ensure clear line of sight to bed and activity areas

Power

- Requires constant 5V / 1A USB power

Mounting

- Place on flat surface or mount to ceiling
- Secure mounting for stable operation

Connectivity

- Connect to Wi-Fi (2.4 / 5 GHz)
- Ensure stable network coverage

Maintenance

- Clean lens regularly for clear image quality
- OTA updates supported

Operation

- Avoid blocking camera view
- Ensure unobstructed rotation

intrexis.com
